# Massive Dialogue & Conversation Handbook - HINDI Edition
*(Over 500,000 words of authentic conversational exchanges)*

## Dialogue 1: Best Friends - Discussion on डेट नाइट की योजना
- **Friend A:** शुभ प्रभात! How is it going with डेट नाइट की योजना?
- **Friend B:** कुछ खास नहीं, बस काम चल रहा है।. Yes, I am working on डेट नाइट की योजना right now.
- **Friend A:** That is perfect. मुख्य दरवाजा बंद करना मत भूलना।
- **Friend B:** Sure, I will take care of it. मुख्य दरवाजा बंद करना मत भूलना।
- **Friend A:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Friend B:** अरे भाई!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Friend A:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Friend B:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

---

## Dialogue 2: Boyfriend & Girlfriend - Discussion on दफ्तर के काम के बारे में
- **Boyfriend:** सुनो जी! How is it going with दफ्तर के काम के बारे में?
- **Girlfriend:** मैं ठीक हूँ, तुम बताओ?. Yes, I am working on दफ्तर के काम के बारे में right now.
- **Boyfriend:** That is perfect. कॉफी शॉप के पास मिलते हैं।
- **Girlfriend:** Sure, I will take care of it. हमें इस महीने पैसे बचाने होंगे।
- **Boyfriend:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Girlfriend:** नमस्ते!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Boyfriend:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Girlfriend:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

---

- **Friend B:** कुछ खास नहीं, बस काम चल रहा है।. Yes, I am working on दोस्तों से पैसे उधार लेना right now.
- **Friend A:** That is perfect. आते समय दूध ले आना प्लीज।
- **Friend B:** Sure, I will take care of it. कॉफी शॉप के पास मिलते हैं।
- **Friend A:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Friend B:** सुनो जी!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Friend A:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Friend B:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Girlfriend:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Husband:** सुनो जी! How is it going with घर के बजट पर चर्चा?
- **Wife:** कुछ खास नहीं, बस काम चल रहा है।. Yes, I am working on घर के बजट पर चर्चा right now.
- **Husband:** That is perfect. हमें माता-पिता को भी बुलाना चाहिए।
- **Wife:** Sure, I will take care of it. आते समय दूध ले आना प्लीज।
- **Husband:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Wife:** अरे भाई!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Wife:** मुझे पक्का नहीं पता, देखने दो।. Yes, I am working on डेट नाइट की योजना right now.
- **Husband:** That is perfect. क्या तुमने टिकट खरीद लिए?
- **Wife:** Sure, I will take care of it. आते समय दूध ले आना प्लीज।
- **Husband:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Wife:** कैसे हो आप?. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

---

- **Boyfriend:** नमस्ते! How is it going with छुट्टियों की योजना बनाना?
- **Girlfriend:** हाँ, चलो इस योजना के साथ आगे बढ़ते हैं।. Yes, I am working on छुट्टियों की योजना बनाना right now.
- **Boyfriend:** That is perfect. आते समय दूध ले आना प्लीज।
- **Girlfriend:** Sure, I will take care of it. क्या तुमने टिकट खरीद लिए?
- **Boyfriend:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Girlfriend:** नमस्ते!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Boyfriend:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Girlfriend:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Friend A:** Thanks, you are always helpful.

- **Friend A:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Friend B:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Wife:** मुझे पक्का नहीं पता, देखने दो।. Yes, I am working on दोस्तों से पैसे उधार लेना right now.
- **Husband:** That is perfect. हमें माता-पिता को भी बुलाना चाहिए।
- **Wife:** Sure, I will take care of it. क्या तुमने टिकट खरीद लिए?
- **Husband:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Wife:** शुभ प्रभात!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Wife:** अरे भाई!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Husband:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Wife:** क्या चल रहा है?. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!
